holdings.infoBox: IXC is an equity ETF with a total of 65 individual holdings. The top holdings are Exxon Mobil stock at 17.60%, Chevron at 9.96%, Shell at 6.91%, TotalEnergies SE at 5.08%, and ConocoPhillips at 4.08%.

overview.description: The iShares Global Energy ETF (IXC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in energy equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of global energy companies. IXC was launched on Nov 12, 2001 and is issued by BlackRock.
